title: glyceria × digenea
intro: Glyceria × digenea, also known as manchurian bentgrass, is a hybrid plant species within the Poaceae family, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. It is used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating congestion, and soothing irritated mucous membranes, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Glyceria × digenea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal and health benefits, with some traditional herbal practitioners also using it in combination with other herbs for enhanced effects.
